page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Dart: a fast and accurate RNA-seq mapper
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Denoising Algorithm based on Relevance network Topology is an algorithm designed to evaluate the consistency of prior information molecular signatures (e.g in-vitro perturbation expression signatures) in independent molecular data (e.g gene expression data sets). If consistent, a pruning network strategy is then used to infer the activation status of the molecular signature in individual samples.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Denoising Algorithm based on Relevance network Topology is an algorithm designed to evaluate the consistency of prior information molecular signatures (e.g in-vitro perturbation expression signatures) in independent molecular data (e.g gene expression data sets).
